message:
feat(e2e): add Agent Mail integration tests with test server seeding

brenner_bot-59rs: E2E Tests Full Session Lifecycle with Real Agent Mail

- Add agent-mail-seeder.ts with session seeding utilities
- Add agent-mail-integration.spec.ts with comprehensive E2E tests
- Extend test fixtures with testSession fixture for Agent Mail
- Export seeding utilities from e2e/utils/index.ts

Tests cover:
- Seeded kickoff session display
- Delta message rendering
- Compiled artifact display
- Thread navigation between sessions
- Expandable message cards
- Error handling for non-existent threads
